infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Location is used to track your delivery position in real-time.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Location is used to track your delivery position even when the app is in the background.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Camera is used to scan package barcodes and capture proof of delivery.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Photo library is used to attach proof of delivery photos.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Driver App to access camera for barcode scanning and proof of delivery photos.
